Service

Community & Civic

Public art, festival pieces, school walls, and restoration work. The murals that helped turn St. Petersburg into an arts destination.

What we do

Art that shapes the neighborhood.

Long before St. Pete was a mural city, Vitale Bros. was painting it. For more than three decades we've worked with nonprofits, advocacy groups, schools, festivals, and the city itself to put art on walls that belong to everyone. This is often the work we're proudest of.

We take on civic and community commissions on a case-by-case basis, with pricing that reflects the cause. Nonprofits, school districts, and community partners can reach out directly for a conversation about scope and budget.

Public art and festivals SHINE Mural Festival, Localtopia, city-commissioned walls, downtown placemaking.
Advocacy and nonprofit Work like Power to the Patients, community healthcare, youth-focused nonprofits.
Restoration and vandalism recovery Repainting tagged or damaged public murals and preserving cultural landmarks.
Signature Civic Work

Three landmark projects.

SHINE Mural Festival

Contributing to St. Pete's mural identity

The SHINE Mural Festival turned St. Petersburg into a national mural destination. Vitale Bros. has been part of the lineup since the early years, painting festival walls that anchor the city's annual arts calendar.

Read the St. Pete Catalyst story →
Power to the Patients

A wall for healthcare advocacy

Commissioned by the Power to the Patients campaign, this mural puts transparency in healthcare pricing on a public wall in St. Pete. An example of how a commission becomes a megaphone for a cause.

Read the ilovetheburg feature →
Vandalism Restoration

Bringing damaged landmarks back

Public murals are public property, and sometimes they get hit. We handle restoration on our own work and on civic pieces that need a careful hand, repainting sections and resealing so the art lives on.

Read the Creative Loafing piece →
Civic & Nonprofit

Working on a
community project?

Tell us about the wall, the cause, and the community you want to reach. We take civic and nonprofit commissions seriously and price them to match.

Start a Conversation → View Portfolio

Transforming blank walls into vibrant murals. Elevating St. Petersburg's artistic spirit since 1992.
